_comment: MCP config template for the Monet server. Install it first: `npm i -g @team-monet/monet` (or use the npx command below). Merge this entry into your host's MCP server config at user scope so it's available in every project, or per-repo. Examples: Claude Code — `claude mcp add --scope user monet -- monet start`, or merge into ~/.claude.json; Cursor — merge into ~/.cursor/mcp.json; per-repo — consult your host's per-repo MCP config, e.g. Claude Code ./.mcp.json. Storage defaults to the global ~/.monet (organized per project by circle); set env.MONET_STORAGE_DIR for a per-repo store.
